title: AI‑Powered Log Anomaly & Root Cause Detector
description: Automatically detect anomalies in application logs and suggest probable root causes.
problem: Teams manually scan massive log files during incidents, causing delayed resolution.
outcome: Faster incident detection with AI‑generated anomaly insights and root‑cause hints.
approach: Ingest logs, generate embeddings, detect anomalies using ML, and summarize patterns using an LLM.
stack: Python, OpenAI/Azure OpenAI, FAISS, Pandas, Streamlit
